subject: Calculus and Optimization
question: f(x) = x³ is:
options: Odd function
Even function
Neither
Both
explanation: f(-x)=(-x)³=-x³=-f(x), so odd. Symmetric about origin.

subject: Calculus and Optimization
question: f(x) = |x| is continuous everywhere but:
options: Not differentiable at x=0
Not continuous at x=0
Differentiable everywhere
Undefined at x=0
explanation: |x| has a corner at 0. Left derivative=-1, right derivative=+1. Not differentiable at x=0.

subject: Calculus and Optimization
question: Injective (one-to-one) function means:
options: f(a)=f(b) implies a=b
f is onto
f is continuous
f has inverse
explanation: Injective: distinct inputs give distinct outputs. Horizontal line test for graphs.
